suggestion.rationale: All six records represent distinct projects under the BRT Phase I Program. Their identity fields (project_name, project_type, and geographic scope) differ comprehensively, satisfying the contradiction test (test 1) of the Identity Merge Canon. Program membership is not a strong identity field per the canon and the review reasons provided. Therefore every pair in this cluster is a do_not_merge.
